sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date, event_time DateTime);
SELECT id, subtractMonths(event_date, multiIf(event_date IS NULL, 12, event_date < '2024-06-01', 3, true, 1)) AS adjusted_date FROM test_dates HAVING adjusted_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, subtractMonths(event_time, toUInt32(NULL)) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates WHERE adjusted_time IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT id, subtractMonths(event_date, 1) AS modified_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL) AS subquery SELECT id, modified_date FROM subquery WHERE modified_date >= '2024-01-01' ORDER BY modified_date;
CREATE TABLE test_events (event_id UInt32, event_date String, event_time String, event_type String);
SELECT event_id, subtractMonths(toDate(event_date), 1) AS new_date FROM test_events WHERE transform(event_type, ['A', 'B'], [1, 2], 'C') = 1;

WITH (SELECT event_id, subtractMonths(toDate(event_time), toUInt8(5)) AS modified_time FROM test_events WHERE toDate(event_time) IS NOT NULL) AS times SELECT event_id, modified_time FROM times WHERE modified_time IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT id, subtractMonths(event_date, transform(event_id, [1, 2, 3], [1, 2, 3], 0)) AS adjusted_event_date FROM test_dates) AS adjusted_dates SELECT id, adjusted_event_date FROM adjusted_dates WHERE adjusted_event_date <= '2023-12-31';
